Id1.text: The AIDAluna is operated by AIDA Cruises which are located at Rostock.

Id2.text: AIDA Cruises, located in Rostock, are the operator of the ship AIDAluna.

Id3.text: AIDAluna is operated by AIDA Cruises from Rostock.
